hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then cd /Users/gyuyoung/Documents/claude-test/figma-design-implementation && git add "$FILE" && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "auto: update ${FILE##*/}" && git push origin main; fi
